businessContext_i18n.fr: Superficie totale du champ en hectares.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total del campo en hectáreas.

inputs.label: Target Plant Density
inputs.businessContext: Desired number of plants per square meter after emergence.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired number of plants per square meter after emergence.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkış sonrası metrekare başına istenen bitki sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Anzahl Pflanzen pro Quadratmeter nach Auflauf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre souhaité de plantes par mètre carré après levée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número deseado de plantas por metro cuadrado después de la emergencia.

inputs.label: Germination Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of seeds that will germinate under normal conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of seeds that will germinate under normal conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal koşullarda çimlenmesi beklenen tohum yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Prozentsatz der Samen, die unter normalen Bedingungen keimen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage attendu de graines qui germeront dans des conditions normales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de semillas que germinarán en condiciones normales.

inputs.label: Seed Purity
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of pure, viable seeds in the lot (excludes inert matter and other crop seeds).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of pure, viable seeds in the lot (excludes inert matter and other crop seeds).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Partideki saf, canlı tohum yüzdesi (inert madde ve diğer ürün tohumları hariç).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz reiner, keimfähiger Samen in der Partie (ohne inerte Bestandteile und andere Kulturarten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de graines pures et viables dans le lot (exclut les matières inertes et les autres graines de cultures).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de semillas puras y viables en el lote (excluye materia inerte y otras semillas de cultivos).

inputs.label: Thousand Kernel Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of 1000 kernels in grams, indicating seed size and quality.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of 1000 kernels in grams, indicating seed size and quality.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1000 tane ağırlığı gram cinsinden, tohum boyutunu ve kalitesini belirtir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht von 1000 Körnern in Gramm, ein Indikator für Korngröße und -qualität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids de 1000 grains en grammes, indiquant la taille et la qualité des semences.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso de 1000 granos en gramos, indicando el tamaño y la calidad de la semilla.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
